title: Dapr StateItem
description: Represents a state key/value pair used in Dapr state management operations, including optional concurrency control via ETags and metadata.

value.description: The state value. Can be any JSON-serializable value.

metadata.description: Additional key/value metadata for the state operation.

options.description: Options for concurrency and consistency behavior.

concurrency.description: Concurrency mode for the state operation.

consistency.description: Consistency level for the state operation.
